dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Jack. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Jack! How can I help you today?
I work as a game developer. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A game developer — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
Outside of work I enjoy running, meditation. I also like reading about NLP.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
By the way, I'm also interested in transformers.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
